sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ascii (id INT, character_string VARCHAR(10));
INSERT INTO test_ascii (id, character_string) VALUES (1, R'€');
SELECT id, ascii(character_string) FROM test_ascii WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_ascii SET character_string = R'£' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, ascii(character_string) AS unicode_point FROM test_ascii WHERE ascii(character_string) > 160;
